title: Floral Canadian Cookie Salad
description: A sweet and fragrant dessert that layers Oreo cream biscuits with a floral cream dressing, perfect for a bento-box treat.
instructions: Crush 24 oreos into fine crumbs using a food processor or by placing them in a zip-top bag and pounding with a rolling pin.
Melt 4 tbsp butter in a microwave for 30 seconds and stir until liquid.
In a separate bowl, soften 1 cup cream cheese by microwaving for 20 seconds.
Beat the cream cheese with 2 tbsp powdered sugar and 1 tsp vanilla extract until smooth.
Fold the melted butter into the cream cheese mixture.
Add 1 tbsp rose water and a pinch of sea salt, then mix until fragrant.
Combine the Oreo crumbs and the cream filling, stirring until the crumbs are evenly coated.
Gently fold in 2 tbsp water to loosen the mix into a salad-like consistency.
Transfer the mixture into a clean bento-box and chill in the refrigerator for 10 minutes.
Just before serving, top with 12 edible flowers for an extra floral touch.
